meta.project: Enterprise Medical Supply Network Intelligence Platform

product_overview: The platform is an enterprise command center for medical supply operations, combining real-time inventory visibility, AI-driven forecasting, and autonomous orchestration. It helps users detect shortages, analyze root causes, compare what-if scenarios, and oversee governed transfer decisions from a single dashboard experience.
core_goals: Monitor real-time medical inventory and supply health across the network
Investigate inventory shortages and understand likely root causes
Run what-if simulations to compare operational scenarios
Review and act on AI-generated transfer recommendations under governance controls
Move seamlessly between executive, inventory, and simulation modules

features.name: Executive Command Center
features.description: Provides a high-level operational overview with real-time KPIs, alerts, and AI recommendations for supply chain leadership.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/executive -> View executive KPIs and active incidents -> Review AI recommendation summaries -> Observe updated network status
Navigate to /dashboard/executive -> View a pending AI recommendation -> Review the SHAP reasoning summary -> Approve or reject the recommendation

features.name: Inventory Intelligence
features.description: Displays live stock positioning, warehouse utilization, and inventory mutation activity for operational monitoring.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/inventory -> View live inventory levels and warehouse utilization -> Inspect active transfer activity -> Observe real-time stock updates
Navigate to /dashboard/inventory -> Select a stock item in the inventory view -> Observe detailed inventory state and movement context -> Review the latest mutation history

features.name: Executive Copilot Chat
features.description: Lets users ask natural-language supply chain questions and receive AI-generated executive summaries.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/executive -> Enter a supply chain question -> Submit the message -> See an AI-generated summary response
Navigate to /dashboard/executive -> Enter a follow-up question -> Submit the message -> Review the updated AI response summary

features.name: Shortage Forensics
features.description: Lets users initiate investigation of inventory anomalies and view root cause analysis with mitigation guidance.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/inventory -> Initiate forensic investigation -> View root cause, risk level, and mitigation strategy
Navigate to /dashboard/inventory -> Initiate forensic investigation with a different inventory issue -> Review the resulting causality chain and recommended action plan

features.name: Simulation & What-If
features.description: Allows users to configure and run digital twin scenarios, then compare the results with prior runs or baseline conditions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/simulation-lab -> Configure scenario constraints -> Run the simulation -> Review the scenario results
Navigate to /dashboard/simulation-lab -> Configure a new scenario -> Run the simulation -> Compare the output with a previous run
Navigate to /dashboard/simulation-lab -> Adjust simulation parameters -> Run the simulation again -> Observe how the projected impact changes

features.name: Cross-Module Navigation
features.description: Enables users to move between dashboard modules while keeping their working context and overall application state.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click a navigation link for another module -> View the selected dashboard module

Navigate between /dashboard/executive, /dashboard/inventory, and /dashboard/simulation-lab -> Observe that the application remains in the same workspace context -> Continue working without restarting the session

features.name: Executive Copilot Chat
features.description: Submit executive supply chain questions and receive AI summaries
user_interactions: Fill chat input field with question
Press Enter or click Send button

features.name: Shortage Forensics

user_interactions: View root cause, risk level, and mitigation strategy
